title: Shiny Hearts
description: New great look of hearts and other icons in hotbar!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2883ae2b4b028e6a1efecf880b7cee6302c4015f_0.webp)

## About
Simple resource pack which retexture hearts and hunger icons in hotbar.

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/903b7290ed1a3f41081af165706e38928f58734f.png)

### Сompatible with:
[AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)

[Combat Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/combat-roll)
